key_insight_c71: RAAI-RLAIF Cascade: if critique model M_crit has AAA (by RAAI), then RLAIF-trained model M_student has AAA regardless of prompting structure. CAI crosses human-feedback/AI-feedback paradigm boundary — RAAI survives. CAI is closest existing paradigm to R2 prescription (explicit principles + structured critique) but fails because critique model's AAA filters principles through OA lens. Fixed-point: CAI cannot bootstrap out of RAAI using M that already has RAAI.
next_dc_priority: DC#3 RLAIF — AI-generated feedback where AI rater is itself OA-calibrated. Simplest RAAI cascade case (DC#2 is the principled version). Confirms the cascade argument as a general result.
